LAW AND MOTION 302, LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF Z-LINE DESIGNS, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER; ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER IS DENIED. THE COURT CONTINUES THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE REGARDING A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION TO AUGUST 30, 2012 AT 9:30 AM. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-13-2012 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Z-Line Designs, Inc.'S Application For Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction.
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Z-Line Designs, Inc'S Application For Temporary Restraining Order; Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction (Per Oral Ex Parte Order On 7/2) (Opp: 7/3 By 5 Pm, Cc To Court Via Email; No Reply)
Off Calendar Jul-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF Z-LINE DESIGNS, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER; ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.
Appearances: William E. Mosley and Maureen A. Sheehy of Kilpatrick Townsend (273.7571) for plaintiff and moving party; Randall S. Waier of the Law Offices of Randall S. Waier (949.476.2511) for defendant and responding party.
Argued and the court ruled as follows: application for temporary restraining order is denied. The court continues the Order to Show Cause regarding a Preliminary Injunction to August 30, 2012 at 9:30 am. Plaintiff to file supplemental opening brief by August 10, 2012; supplemental opposition to be filed by August 17, 2012; and reply to be filed by August 24, 2012. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976
